short: An AI hardware company building custom chips and systems for training and inference.
definition: SambaNova is an AI hardware and systems company that designs custom processors aimed at running and training large models efficiently. Its flexible chip design aims to handle a high volume of work for both training and inference (running a trained model), and it offers full systems and a cloud service rather than only chips. It is one of several companies building alternatives to the GPU chips (graphics chips repurposed for AI math) that most AI systems run on.
